Minumnya? Teh tawar hangat. 

Pemandangannya? Indah luar biasa, Masya Allah Tabarakallah.

🥗 Erbsen-Fritter mit pochiertem Ei & Kräutern

🛒 Zutaten (für 2 Portionen)

Für die Fritter:

* 250 g grüne Erbsen (frisch oder TK, aufgetaut)
* 1 Ei
* 2 EL Mehl oder Hafermehl
* 1 kleine Knoblauchzehe
* 2 EL gehackte Kräuter (Minze, Petersilie)
* Salz & Pfeffer
* etwas Zitronenabrieb
* Öl zum Braten

Für das Topping:

* 2 Eier (zum Pochieren)
* 3 EL Naturjoghurt oder griechischer Joghurt
* 1 TL Honig
* frische Minze
* gehackte Pistazien oder Nüsse (optional)
* Zitronensaft

⸻

👩‍🍳 Zubereitung

1. Fritter-Masse vorbereiten

* Erbsen grob pürieren (nicht zu fein)
* Ei, Mehl, Knoblauch, Kräuter und Gewürze untermischen
* Alles zu einer leicht formbaren Masse verrühren

2. Fritter braten

* Öl in einer Pfanne erhitzen
* Kleine Fladen formen und bei mittlerer Hitze 3–4 Minuten pro Seite goldbraun braten
* Auf Küchenpapier abtropfen lassen

⸻

3. Eier pochieren

* Wasser in einem Topf erhitzen (nicht kochen lassen!)
* Einen Schuss Essig hinzufügen
* Ei vorsichtig hineingleiten lassen
* Ca. 3 Minuten pochieren, bis das Eiweiß fest ist
* Herausnehmen und abtropfen lassen

⸻

4. Anrichten

* Fritter auf einen Teller legen
* Etwas Joghurt darauf geben
* Pochiertes Ei oben drauf setzen
* Mit Honig beträufeln 🍯
* Mit Kräutern, Nüssen und Zitronensaft verfeinern

⸻

🍽️ Tipp

👉 Perfekt als leichtes Mittagessen oder gesundes Frühstück
👉 Auch mega lecker mit Avocado oder Feta

Un equilibrio perfetto tra leggerezza e bontà, ideale per una pausa sfiziosa o un momento di puro piacere. 💛

Feeling the Monday Blues? 

Why not brighten up your workweek by planning a visit to a Korean spa this weekend? You can unwind and de-stress without overspending, with admission starting at just $20 on weekdays before 8:30 AM (excluding holidays), or $30 for a full day of access to various spa amenities. I tried my first Korean spa last year and enjoyed it so much that I couldn't wait to go back. Crystal Spa, located in Koreatown, Los Angeles, is conveniently situated in the same mall as H-Mart, so you won't have to search for street parking! There's a structured parking lot that offers free parking for up to 6 hours. I love the convenience; I can easily stop by before or after grocery shopping.

Crystal Spa features:
- Himalayan Room
- Mud Room
- Charcoal Room
- Cool Down Room
- Dry Sauna
- Jimjilbang (Common Room)
- Skincare Lab (additional charge for treatments)
- Workout Studio (Gym)
- Restaurant (additional charges apply)

Hours: 7 AM - 10 PM every day!

✨ Monthly Membership: $350/month
✨ Yearly Membership: $2,000/year

👀 Have you been to a Korean spa before?

👩‍💻pov: you walk into a shop that respects the craft put into the food and drink prepared by the owner

📍Abeki 
3 Chome-7-13 Yakuin, Chuo Ward, Fukuoka, 810-0022, Japan
City: Fukuoka, Japan

they only had 3 types of drink and 3 choices of dessert on the menu and as with these limited selection, u know that the food is bound to be good

▪️iced black 600 yen
▪️cheesecake original 500 yen

their coffee can skip unfortunately, it was too overly roasted, giving this bitter aftertaste but the cheeeesecake!!! it was soo luscious in thebest possible way, creamy but not surfeiting and the texture was dense but also v smooth and semi chew firmness to it, thr was that milky fragrance from the milk and cream used to make this, it can be a tad dry towards the end but i likehow it wasnt super tangy but still balanced cream cheese and the cream well, it felt like a v cohesive cheesecake💖💖

My stewed plums had settled beautifully into a thick jam in the fridge - perfect with my white chocolate flavoured fat free Greek yoghurt. 

Eldest is packed off for a day on the river - 18 miles!! I hope she’ll be ok. 

Housework and then food shopping I guess. I’m struggling at the moment to find foods that I actually fancy and want to cook. I go through phases like this. No food motivation at all… need to give myself a kick up the bum and find some more ideas of low fat foods that I can have. (It would be so much easier if I could eat fish and seafood.) 

Any suggestions welcome.

Have a lovely sunny day everyone. Xx
